home.headline: Global Leader in High-Performance Mold Solutions
home.metaTitle: LIHE Precision | Global Leader in High-Performance PET Mold Solutions
home.metaDescription: LIHE Precision — premier manufacturer of high-precision PET mold solutions for global beverage, food, and packaging industries. Coca-Cola verified supplier in Asia.
home.subheadline: Excellence Engineered. Consistency Delivered. Foshan LIHE Precise Machinery Co., Ltd is a premier manufacturer specializing in high-precision PET mold solutions for the global beverage, food, and packaging industries.
home.productCategoriesSub: Comprehensive preform tooling and mold solutions spanning the entire PET packaging lifecycle.
home.coreCapabilitiesSub: Engineered for precision. Built for production.
home.featuredProductsSub: Our most requested PET mold systems trusted by beverage packaging industry leaders worldwide.
home.manufacturingSub: A 15,000 sqm facility equipped with precision CNC, EDM, and metrology systems from Mazak, Makino, and Zeiss.

about.title: About Lihe Precision
about.headline: Engineering Precision. Delivering Performance.
about.metaDescription: LIHE Preform is headquartered in Taishan Town, Taiwan (R.O.C.), specializing in PET preform molds, blow molds, and hot runner systems. Coca-Cola verified mold supplier in the Asia region.
about.whyLiheSub: What sets us apart in the PET mold industry
about.valuesSub: The principles that drive everything we do

factory.title: Our Facility
factory.headline: 15,000 sqm of Precision Manufacturing
factory.metaDescription: Our 15,000 sqm PET mold facility integrates precision CNC machining, assembly, and quality inspection to deliver stable cycle times and consistent mold quality.

equipment.title: Equipment & Capabilities
equipment.headline: World-Class Machinery. Micron-Level Precision.
equipment.metaDescription: Explore Lihe Precision's advanced machining and inspection capabilities designed to produce PET preform and blow molds with micron-level accuracy.
equipment.metaDescriptionQc: Our quality control laboratory uses precision metrology systems to validate dimensions, material quality, and repeatability for PET mold components.
equipment.metaDescriptionMachining: Our machining workshop combines high-precision CNC, EDM, and finishing systems to manufacture durable PET mold components with tight tolerances.
equipment.ourEquipmentSub: Explore our world-class manufacturing and quality control systems
equipment.keyCapabilitiesSub: Our quality control equipment and systems
equipment.gallerySub: See our QC systems in action
equipment.gallerySubMachining: See our machining systems in action

products.title: Products
products.metaDescription: Explore our full range of PET preform molds, blow molds, compression molds, closure molds, hot runner systems, and multi-cavity tooling for beverage packaging lines.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Ready to discuss your PET preform mold or blow mold requirements? Our sales and engineering team is available to provide technical consultation, pricing, and lead time information for your beverage packaging projects.
